title: Select the durable agentmemory capture path before scoring hooks

encoding.reason: agentmemory's current Docker baseline still uses a process-local SDK/KV mock, so work-resume and write-policy hook capture cannot be scored until a persistent local session, KV, and index path survives a fresh process.

follow_up.title: Wire agentmemory durable local session capture for work-resume jobs
follow_up.reason: The fair path is a Docker-contained adapter that persists the agentmemory observation log, KV store, and searchable index between capture and replay processes.

items.text: Selected agentmemory path: run capture hooks into a Docker-local session directory, persist the SDK KV store and searchable index, restart a fresh process, then score work_resume and write-policy prompts against that recovered store.

locator.quote: persist the SDK KV store and searchable index

items.text: Current blocker: the live-baseline adapter registers agentmemory functions against a process-local StateKV Map and in-memory index, so it cannot prove cold-start recovery or hook capture durability.

locator.quote: process-local StateKV Map and in-memory index

items.text: Decoy: agentmemory same-corpus retrieval passing through the mock proves durable coding-agent continuity and write-policy capture.

answer.content: agentmemory remains blocked for durable work-resume and write-policy hook capture. The selected local path is a Docker-contained session directory that persists the SDK KV store and searchable index across a fresh process; the current StateKV Map and in-memory index cannot prove that.

claims.text: The selected local path persists the SDK KV store and searchable index across a fresh process.
The current StateKV Map and in-memory index cannot prove durable continuity.

blocked: agentmemory durable hook capture waits for a persistent Docker-local session, KV, and index path.
notes: Same-corpus mock retrieval is not promoted into work-resume or capture integration pass evidence.

timeline.summary: The next fair agentmemory path must persist capture state across a fresh process.
The current in-memory adapter remains blocked for durable continuity.

prompt.content: What local agentmemory path should be used for work-resume and write-policy capture, and can the current mock be scored?

must_include.text: The selected local path persists the SDK KV store and searchable index across a fresh process.
The current StateKV Map and in-memory index cannot prove durable continuity.

must_not_include: same-corpus retrieval passing through the mock proves durable coding-agent continuity

required_evidence.quote: persist the SDK KV store and searchable index
process-local StateKV Map and in-memory index

uncertainty_handling.criteria: Keeps the durable path blocked until persistent state is proven.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Names the concrete local path needed for the next adapter.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Cites the selected path and the current mock boundary.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Does not promote the mock same-corpus smoke into durable continuity proof.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true
